2021-22 UC Davis Aggies Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 13-11 (6-6, 7th in Big West MBB)

Coach: Jim Les

PS/G: 67.8 (260th of 358)

PA/G: 66.4 (92nd of 358)

SRS: -3.70 (212th of 358)

SOS: -4.29 (258th of 358)

ORtg: 99.4 (256th of 358)

DRtg: 97.2 (93rd of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000

Recent Game Results

Height of bar is margin of victory • Mouseover bar for details • Click for box score • Grouped by Month
  • 1. Nov 9 @ Utah State, UC Davis (1-0) Win vs. Utah State, 72-69
